close_reason: Created Payload module with encode/decode, updated Item and Worker to use it
description:
Payload encoding split between modules:
- Item.encode_payload/1 (item.ex:102-103) - encodes at enqueue
- Worker.decode_payload/1 (worker.ex:101-108) - decodes at execution

Fix: Create Payload module with encode/decode used by both.
title: Centralize payload encoding
